preview.no_account_selected: Select WechatSync accounts to inspect the exact payload each platform will receive before syncing.
preview.title: Pre-sync content check

precheck.blocking_toast: The selected WechatSync accounts still have unresolved compatibility issues. Adjust the content or deselect those accounts first.
precheck.xiaohongshu_adjusted_title: Xiaohongshu accounts will use compatible content
precheck.xiaohongshu_adjusted_detail: When heading anchors, custom notice blocks, code-group wrappers, or copy buttons are detected, the payload will be cleaned into a Xiaohongshu-friendly format before sync. Accounts: {accounts}
precheck.xiaohongshu_blocking_title: Xiaohongshu accounts still contain unsupported components
precheck.xiaohongshu_blocking_detail: The current content still contains components that the Xiaohongshu editor does not support yet: {components}. Remove those structures or deselect these accounts before syncing again. Accounts: {accounts}
precheck.weibo_adjusted_title: Weibo accounts will use compatible content
precheck.weibo_adjusted_detail: When blockquotes, code styling, heading anchors, or image containers are detected, the payload will be downgraded to a Weibo-compatible format before sync. Accounts: {accounts}
precheck.weibo_blocking_title: Weibo accounts still contain unsupported components
precheck.weibo_blocking_detail: The current content still contains components that Weibo does not support yet: {components}. Remove those structures or deselect these accounts before syncing again. Accounts: {accounts}
